title: Light-filled 2-bed warehouse conversion, Shoreditch
description: A bright 2-bedroom warehouse conversion two minutes from Shoreditch High Street station. Huge south-east windows flood the open-plan living space with light, and there's a private balcony off the kitchen. Perfect for a buyer who wants character, light and a short hop to the City.

title: Modern 2-bed apartment with balcony, Shoreditch
description: Sleek 2-bed, 2-bath in a modern Shoreditch development, four minutes' walk to Old Street. A south-facing balcony and full-height glazing make it exceptionally bright. Well within a 600k budget and ready to move into.

title: 2-bed with roof terrace, Shoreditch / Hoxton border
description: A bright corner 2-bedroom flat on the Shoreditch/Hoxton border, right by Hoxton overground. Residents share a landscaped roof terrace with City skyline views. Great natural light throughout — comfortably under 600k.

title: Premium 2-bed apartment, central Shoreditch
description: A premium 2-bed in the heart of Shoreditch with parking and a gym. Beautiful, but priced above a 600k budget — a useful near-miss to show ranking respecting the price ceiling.

title: Compact 1-bed apartment, Shoreditch
description: A well-priced 1-bedroom flat in Shoreditch with a small balcony, close to Old Street. Right area and budget but one bedroom short of a 2-bed brief.

title: Spacious 3-bed apartment, Shoreditch
description: A generous 3-bed in Shoreditch with a large terrace. Over budget and more space than a 2-bed brief calls for.

title: 2-bed Victorian townhouse, Shoreditch
description: A charming 2-bedroom Victorian townhouse with a private garden in Shoreditch. Right area and beds, but it's a house (not a flat) and above budget.

title: Bright 2-bed apartment with balcony, Hoxton
description: A bright canalside 2-bed in Hoxton with a balcony, a few minutes from Hoxton station. Strong adjacent-area match for a Shoreditch buyer who'll flex on neighbourhood.

title: 2-bed apartment near the tube, Bethnal Green
description: A recently refurbished 2-bedroom flat moments from Bethnal Green tube, with a balcony. Good value in budget, one stop from Shoreditch.

title: 2-bed warehouse-style apartment, Hackney
description: A 2-bed warehouse-style flat in Hackney with large windows and a communal garden, close to Hackney Central overground. Bright and well under budget.

title: 2-bed period conversion, Islington
description: An elegant 2-bed period conversion in Islington near Angel, with high ceilings and original features. Lovely but a touch over a 600k ceiling.

title: 2-bed apartment by Dalston Junction
description: A bright open-plan 2-bed beside Dalston Junction with a balcony. Excellent value, well within budget, and very well connected.

title: 2-bed apartment near the common, Clapham
description: A south-facing 2-bed, 2-bath near Clapham Common with a balcony. Bright and in budget — south London alternative for a flexible buyer.

title: 2-bed apartment, Brixton
description: A light 2-bed with shared roof terrace a short walk from Brixton tube. Good value and lively location.

title: 2-bed apartment with river-view balcony, Canary Wharf
description: A 2-bed, 2-bath with a river-view balcony in a Canary Wharf tower, steps from the station. Slightly over budget; strong on light and amenities.

title: 3-bed family house with garden, Greenwich
description: A 3-bedroom family house with garden and parking in Greenwich. A different profile entirely — useful contrast in the seeded set.

title: 1-bed apartment, Peckham
description: An affordable, bright 1-bed near Peckham Rye with a balcony. Entry-level option; wrong bed count for a 2-bed brief.

title: 2-bed apartment, Bermondsey
description: A bright 2-bed, 2-bath near Bermondsey tube with a balcony and floor-to-ceiling windows. Just over a 600k ceiling — a close near-miss.

title: 2-bed warehouse apartment by the river, Wapping
description: A characterful 2-bed warehouse conversion by the river in Wapping. Over budget; strong on character and light.

title: 3-bed family house, Stoke Newington
description: A 3-bed period family house with garden near Stoke Newington Church Street. Premium family option, well above budget.

title: 2-bed apartment, Walthamstow
description: A bright, well-priced 2-bed near Walthamstow Central with a balcony. Great value and on the Victoria line.

title: 2-bed apartment near the station, Camden
description: A bright canalside 2-bed near Camden Town tube with a balcony. In budget and well connected for a buyer open to north London.
